mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an accommodative monetary policy that lowers discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS declines by >0.1pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with declining unemployment signals robust labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Payroll growth exceeds 135k and unemployment falls below 7.5% but SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing activity that supports corporate profits, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases by >1.5% but SPX 20d returns are negative in 40%+ of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating GDP growth reflects strong aggregate demand that drives corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth exceeds 3% but SPX 60d returns are negative in 35%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent disinflation (CPI below 2%) signals stable price environment that supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPI remains below 2% but SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in inflation and interest rates create favorable financial conditions for equity markets, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both CPI and FEDFUNDS meet thresholds but SPX 20d returns are negative in 45%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment during post-recession recovery phases signals improving labor market dynamics that drive equity market gains over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Unemployment declines by >0.5pp but SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts reflect strong demand for residential construction that boosts related industries, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST increases by >5% but SPX 20d returns are negative in 35%+ of cases.
